description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 26, 2025 at 1:57 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Santa Clara, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Saratoga Avenue near San Tomas Expressway. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped on Saratoga Court, preparing to turn right onto northeastbound Saratoga Avenue while yielding to oncoming 
traffic. Once oncoming traffic had cleared, the Waymo AV began to turn right into the rightmost lane on northeastbound Saratoga Avenue. 
As the Waymo AV was completing the right turn, the test driver transitioned the Waymo AV to manual mode. The test driver changed lanes 
without a signal activated, crossing through the center travel lane and into the dedicated left turn lane where the test driver began to make an 
unprotected left across southwestbound Saratoga Avenue. During this unprotected left turn, an SUV was traveling in the leftmost 
southwestbound lane. The SUV began to maneuver towards the rightmost lane while the test driver was completing the left turn, and the 
front of the SUV made contact with the passenger side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
